ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the data is recorded */,
  "mandal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mandal where the data is recorded */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station that recorded the data */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the data was recorded (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "rain_mm" REAL /* Amount of rainfall in millimeters */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded in degrees Celsius */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded in degrees Celsius */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity in percentage */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity in percentage */,
  "min_wind_speed" REAL /* Minimum wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "max_wind_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Amount of solar radiation */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_mandal_id FOREIGN KEY ("mandal_id") REFERENCES mandals ("mandal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* Name of the state where the district is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the district */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mandals" (
  "mandal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mandal */,
  "mandal_name" TEXT /* Name of the mandal */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the mandal is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the mandal */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the mandal */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the mandal */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the mandal in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mandal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district of the station */,
  "mandal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mandal of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the station */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_mandal_id FOREIGN KEY ("mandal_id") REFERENCES mandals ("mandal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather record with the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly detected */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the anomaly */,
  "detected_by" TEXT /* User who detected the anomaly */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "detected_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the anomaly was detected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_anomalies_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district for the forecast */,
  "mandal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mandal for the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "predicted_rain_mm" REAL /* Predicted rainfall in millimeters */,
  "predicted_min_temp" REAL /* Predicted minimum temperature */,
  "predicted_max_temp" REAL /* Predicted maximum temperature */,
  "predicted_min_humidity" REAL /* Predicted minimum humidity */,
  "predicted_max_humidity" REAL /* Predicted maximum humidity */,
  "predicted_min_wind_speed" REAL /* Predicted minimum wind speed */,
  "predicted_max_wind_speed" REAL /* Predicted maximum wind speed */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_mandal_id FOREIGN KEY ("mandal_id") REFERENCES mandals ("mandal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate characteristics of the zone */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the climate zone */,
  "average_rainfall" REAL /* Average rainfall of the climate zone */,
  "description_source" TEXT /* Source of the climate zone description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_climate_zones" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the climate zone associated with the district */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the climate zone classification */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the climate zone classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id", "zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "long_term_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district for which trends are recorded */,
  "analysis_period" TEXT /* Analysis period for the trend data */,
  "avg_annual_rain_mm" REAL /* Average annual rainfall in millimeters */,
  "avg_annual_temp" REAL /* Average annual temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "avg_annual_humidity" REAL /* Average annual humidity in percentage */,
  "avg_annual_wind_speed" REAL /* Average annual wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., historical records, satellite data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_long_term_trends_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)
